notes.introduction: An exposition of Romans 8:35-39, 2 Corinthians 5:9-15, and Ephesians 3:14-19 on the believer's calling to convey the love of Christ, organized around three occurrences of the phrase 'love of Christ' in Scripture. Delivered by a missionary to the Samoan Islands during an evening service at a supporting church.

sections.heading: Introduction: Three Occurrences of 'Love of Christ'
Romans 1 to 8: Depth of Sin to Mountaintop
First Question: Confidence in the Love of Christ
Second Question: Constraint by the Love of Christ
Third Question: Comprehension of the Love of Christ
Four Dimensions of Love in Ephesians 2 and 3
